case_title: SANDHYA A. CHIB-JACOB et al VS. LUKE O'BRIEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,823.00 FILED BY CHIB-JACOB, SANDHYA A. JACOB, ANUP M. AS TO DEFENDANT O'BRIEN, LUKE C/O MURPHY O'BRIEN REAL-ESTATE INVST. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-12-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-15-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE.NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHIB-JACOB, SANDHYA A.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2011 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-12-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-15-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT'S FRIEND APPEARED AND STATED THAT DEFENDANT UNABLE TO APPEAR DUE TO AN EMERGENCY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT O'BRIEN, LUKE C/O MURPHY O'BRIEN REAL-ESTATE INVST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIB-JACOB, SANDHYA A. JACOB, ANUP M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O'BRIEN, LUKE C/O MURPHY O'BRIEN REAL-ESTATE INVST. $4,823.00 PRINCIPAL, $53.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,876.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
